reason: Widget structure (const, MD3 surfaces, no unnecessary Container, prop ordering, build shape) — required for all new widgets (StitchBasicTabCards / StitchOrientationCard / StitchModeCard) and the StitchControlsPanel rewrite into TabBar + TabBarView.

Compact / Medium / Expanded WindowSizeClass dispatch — the TabBar + TabBarView must work both as bottom sheet (compact / medium) and right-docked side panel (expanded / large) without regressing constraint flow through nested LayoutBuilder / Scroll / Constrained chains. StitchControlsSheet maxHeight cap re-evaluation also lives here.

Riverpod controller patterns — required for adding atomic setters (selectMovieSubtitleMode / selectNormalMode / toggleOrientation) on StitchEditorController so subtitleOnlyMode + mode are emitted in a single state transition (no intermediate frame with horizontal+subtitleOnlyMode=true).
Provider conventions — covers how the controller exposes new public methods, naming, and how widgets should ref.read(...).notifier to invoke them. Required when extending stitch_editor_provider.dart.

Exhaustive enum dispatch for StitchMode — every new orientation card / mode-aware Tab branch must explicitly cover both vertical and horizontal so a future third mode does not silently miswire the toolbar.
Decide whether to delete stitch_mode_segmented.dart vs adapt it — also informs whether the basic-tab cards should share a common base widget vs three independent widgets.
Lint + test conventions (const, single quotes, sort_child_properties_last) — required when adding widget tests for tab insertion/removal, card mutual exclusion, and orientation toggle side-effects.
